title: Paper Experiment Matrix
current_judgment: The current evidence is sufficient to present PSMS-v2 as the verified incumbent under the accepted GitHub/PyBaMM contract, but not sufficient to claim superiority on every possible fast-charge task, cell condition, or external benchmark.

rows.tested_surface: Fixed Q30 / plating_loss / sei_growth / total_lli contract with BO_3step_aggressive as the accepted comparator.
rows.why_it_matters: Keeps every later frontier step on one auditable comparison surface.

rows.tested_surface: Nominal surface plus nominal, warm_cell, hot_cell, plating_stress, and sei_stress in followup_v1.
rows.why_it_matters: Shows the last strong fixed-family gain before EVTBO and PSMS-v2.

rows.tested_surface: Nominal surface plus nominal, warm_cell, hot_cell, plating_stress, and sei_stress in followup_v1.
rows.why_it_matters: Defines the previous verified anchor that PSMS-v2 must beat.

rows.tested_surface: Nominal surface plus nominal, warm_cell, hot_cell, plating_stress, and sei_stress in followup_v1.
rows.why_it_matters: Provides the main quantitative win and the promoted final protocol.
Shows that the promoted winner stays rank-1 after leaving the search-time bundle.

rows.tested_surface: Focused warm-start candidate revalidation on nominal, warm_cell, hot_cell, plating_stress, and sei_stress in followup_v1.
rows.why_it_matters: Rejects nominal-only challengers that fail the robust gate and keeps PSMS-v2 as the verified incumbent.
key_numbers: failures appeared in hot_cell, plating_stress, and sei_stress

rows.tested_surface: Matched rerun on nominal, warm_cell, hot_cell, plating_stress, and sei_stress in followup_v1 with only the sequence prior removed.
rows.why_it_matters: Shows that the sequence prior alone is not the sole explanation for the gain.

rows.tested_surface: Matched rerun on nominal, warm_cell, hot_cell, plating_stress, and sei_stress in followup_v1 with only entry activation removed.
rows.why_it_matters: Shows that entry activation alone is not the sole explanation for the gain.
key_numbers: candidate tied the EVTBO anchor exactly

task_wise_verdicts.verdict: PSMS-v2 is the strongest verified protocol on the fixed four-metric nominal surface.
task_wise_verdicts.claim_scope: Supports the contract-level win over BO_3step_aggressive and EVTBO, but not robustness by itself.

task_wise_verdicts.verdict: The promoted PSMS-v2 winner stays fully feasible across the full in-bundle stress set.
task_wise_verdicts.claim_scope: Shows the result is stable inside the accepted GitHub/PyBaMM scenario family, not across every external task.

task_wise_verdicts.verdict: The same winner remains rank-1 after leaving the search bundle.
task_wise_verdicts.claim_scope: Supports one controlled out-of-bundle robustness check, not universal transfer.

task_wise_verdicts.verdict: Two nominal-stronger challengers fail the robust gate in hot_cell, plating_stress, and sei_stress.
task_wise_verdicts.claim_scope: Explains why nominal-only challengers do not replace the verified incumbent.

task_wise_verdicts.verdict: No single component removal collapses the line by itself.
task_wise_verdicts.claim_scope: Keeps the method claim package-level rather than single-module.
No honest all-task or universal-optimality claim.

supported_claims.summary: PSMS-v2 is the strongest verified line under the accepted GitHub/PyBaMM contract.
The result is stable enough for technical external sharing because it survives the search-time bundle, one held-out bundle, and a focused negative stability check.
The supported method story is package-level rather than a single-component causal story.

out_of_scope_claims: all-task superiority across every possible fast-charge task
universal optimality across other chemistries or external simulators
recommended_reopen_paths: Expand the held-out matrix with more temperature and degradation combinations under the same four-metric contract.
Add one genuinely external transfer surface instead of repeating the same local search loop.
Reopen component-attribution work only if a stronger single-module story becomes necessary.
